name: Marvel Zombies
description:
"Things are different now. There are no niggers anymore. No dumb-as-shit, inbred white-trash fools either. Only dark meat and white meat. There's us and the dead. We survive this by pulling together, not apart."

-Rick Grimes

╭══•✧๑♡๑✧•══╮

In a world filled with heroes and villains, half of the humanity has succumbed to a deadly virus making people come from the dead. Coming back as zombies. Earth's heroes as zombies. You on the other still live as a civilian (or hero)

╰══•★•══╯
